allow: Bash(find ~/dev/contentcurator/.ddd -name "*.yaml" 2>/dev/null | head -10; cat ~/dev/contentcurator/ddd-project.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(x\) for x in d.get\('domains',[]\)]" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(cd ~/dev/www.cybersol.nl && grep -rL "auth:" specs/domains/*/flows/*.yaml 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ' && echo "===TOTAL===" && find specs/domains -name "*.yaml" -path "*/flows/*" 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ')

Bash(cd ~/dev/cc-light && grep -rL "auth:" specs/domains/*/flows/*.yaml 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ' && echo "===TOTAL===" && find specs/domains -name "*.yaml" -path "*/flows/*" 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ' && echo "===FORMAT===" && grep -rl "^connections:" specs/domains/*/flows/*.yaml 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ' && echo "top-level format")
